reports.headline: France shatters its all-time national heat record as power cuts spread across Europe, while catastrophic Tropical Storm Arthur flooding claims new ground across the Deep South and Mississippi Basin.
Tropical Storm Higos Strikes Saipan and Tinian as Europe's Deadly Heatwave Claims ~20 Lives in France
Catastrophic flooding expands from the Central Plains into Arkansas, Kentucky, and the Mid-Atlantic as a relentless multi-week storm pattern shows no sign of abating.
Massive multi-state flood emergency expands across the US Central Plains and Midwest as a heatwave scorches Europe on the summer solstice.
Major flooding continues across the U.S. Gulf Coast after storms dump over 29 inches of rain in Louisiana and Mississippi, while Europe swelters under extreme heat.
